name: Chicken & Spaghetti, III
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the hen in water until tender. Remove and debone.
2. Skim fat from the broth to use in the sauce.
3. Combine the fat, tomatoes, celery, bell pepper, onion, mushrooms, and garlic. Simmer about 3 hours, adding broth as needed.
4. Cook spaghetti in the remaining broth, adding a little water if necessary. Add a couple of bouillon cubes to boost flavor, if desired.
5. Drain the spaghetti.
6. In a 3 to 5 quart casserole dish, layer spaghetti, chicken, sauce, and cheese. Place the last layer of cheese just before serving.
Yield: 6 to 8 generous servings.
